WorldMapControl.Title: World Map Control
WorldMapControl.MenuHint: Open the World Map Control window.

Controls.Title: World Map
Controls.ToggleWorldMap: Toggle World Map for this Scene
Controls.WorldMapDisabled: {scene} is no longer a world map.

Panel.EnableMap: Make this scene a world map
Panel.NotAMap: This scene is not a world map yet. Enable it above, or switch to a world-map scene.
Panel.NoPins: No pins on this map yet. Use the Place Pin tool.

Travel.ClearTrailConfirm: Erase the party's entire travel history trail on this map?
Travel.ArrivedMessage: The party arrives at the end of "{route}".

Routes.Heading: Routes
Routes.NoRoutes: No routes yet. Use the Draw Route tool: left-click waypoints, right-click to finish.
Routes.ProposedNotify: {user} proposed a route: "{name}" — see the Travel tab.
Routes.ProposalSent: Route proposal sent to the GM.

Settings.AdvanceWorldTime: Advance world clock 1 day per travel day
Settings.ClimateTableHint: tag results like "Storm [x0.6]" to slow travel

Quests.NoQuests: No quest or rumor pins on this map yet. Create pins with type Quest or Rumor.

Supplies.RationsHint: Set to -1 to disable supply tracking
Supplies.Empty: The party is out of rations!

Pins.TravelHereHint: Ask your GM to travel here.

PinConfig.Title: New Map Pin
PinConfig.Name: Name
PinConfig.DeleteConfirm: Delete the pin "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

tableUuid.label: Encounter Roll Table
tableUuid.hint: UUID of the RollTable to draw encounters from (drag a table here or paste its UUID).

chancePerDay.label: Encounter chance per travel day
chancePerDay.hint: 0–1: probability of an encounter roll each day the party travels through this zone.

terrainMult.label: Terrain speed multiplier
terrainMult.hint: Travel speed multiplier while in this zone (0.5 = half speed). Applied in a later update.

label.label: Zone label
label.hint: Shown to the GM in encounter prompts; defaults to the region name.

mode.label: Check mode
mode.hint: Passive compares passive Perception; Active rolls for each party member.

linkedPinId.label: Linked hidden pin id
linkedPinId.hint: Pin revealed on success (copy the id from the pin list — hover a pin row).

once.label: Trigger only once
once.hint: Disable this behavior after the first success.

revealMessage.label: Success message
revealMessage.hint: Optional message posted to all players on success.

Encounters.NoTable: No roll table linked — improvise, or skip.
Encounters.GmOnly: Encounter prompts appear for the GM only.

Perception.Revealed: The party notices something: {name} has been revealed on the map!

Intent.UnexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Intent.NotAMap: That scene is not a world map.
Intent.PinCapReached: You have reached your party-mark limit on this map.
Intent.NotNavigator: Only the designated navigator can move the party marker.
Intent.NoGM: No GM is connected — try again when your GM is online.
